ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the publication appears */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research area of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the publication was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_research_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the author was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the author's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated author */,
  "contribution_order" INTEGER /* Order of authorship contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution the author was affiliated with at the time of publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the authorship relationship was first established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the authorship relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number for the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the journal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the journal was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the journal's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the publisher was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the publisher's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent research area (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the research area was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the research area's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_areas_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a publication */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication version was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
